task_completion.description: Create a title slide with the correct title and presenter name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The first slide should display 'Takotsubo Cardiomyopathy Case' in a visibly large font (32pt or larger) and include the text 'Dr. Chen'.

task_completion.description: Include a summary of the chief complaint, symptom onset, and clinical outcome.
task_completion.visual_evidence: One or more slides should contain text summarizing the patient's clinical narrative, specifically mentioning 'chest pain' (the chief complaint), when symptoms started, and the outcome.

task_completion.description: Create a lab results slide including specific cardiac markers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide must contain the text 'Troponin' (or 'Troponin I') and 'NT-proBNP'.

task_completion.description: Insert the ECG image and annotate it with 'ST elevation'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide must display an ECG image (ecg_admission.jpg) accompanied by the text annotation 'ST elevation'.

task_completion.description: Insert the angiogram image and annotate it with 'apical ballooning'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A slide must display an angiogram image (lv_angiogram.jpg) accompanied by the text annotation 'apical ballooning'.

task_completion.description: Ensure the presentation has exactly or at least 6 slides.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The slide thumbnail pane on the left side of the ONLYOFFICE editor should show 6 or more slides.

task_completion.description: Save the presentation with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ONLYOFFICE window title bar or a save dialog should display the filename 'grand_rounds_takotsubo.pptx'.

integrity.description: The agent must use the ONLYOFFICE Presentation Editor GUI to create the presentation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ONLYOFFICE Presentation Editor interface being actively used, rather than terminal commands or Python scripts (e.g., python-pptx) generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent must insert actual images into the slides.
integrity.visual_evidence: The slides for ECG and angiogram must show actual graphical images, not just text placeholders like '[Insert Image Here]'.

integrity.description: The agent should not bypass the GUI requirement by using terminal commands to copy or manipulate pre-existing presentation files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show commands like 'cp' or 'mv' being used to place a fully formed .pptx file into the target directory without GUI interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The presentation must be saved to '/home/ga/Documents/Presentations/grand_rounds_takotsubo.pptx'. The presentation must contain a minimum of 6 slides and 2 images. The verifier explicitly checks for the presence of the following exact text strings in the presentation: 'dr. chen', 'chest pain', 'troponin', 'nt-probnp', 'st elevation', and 'apical ballooning'.
